basic_details.job_title: APMSRB Hospital Administrator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 47 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Andhra Pradesh Medical Services Recruitment Board (APMSRB)
basic_details.short_information: Andhra Pradesh Medical Services Recruitment Board (APMSRB) Hospital Administrator Notification 2026 has been released on 01 June 2026 on the official website of APMSRB. A total of 47 vacancies have been announced through the APMSRB Hospital Administrator Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BCs & EWS: up to 47 years; Physically Handicapped: up to 52 years; Ex-Servicemen: 3 years & length of service.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS / MDS, Masters Degree in Hospital Administration or Hospital Management or its equivalent, At least 2 years post-qualification experience in Hospital Administration, At least 1 year work experience in Administration or Leadership or Managerial roles, Computer Literacy in MS Word, Excel, Power point & Web surfing, Fluency in Telugu and English, Knowledge of Govt. Legislations and Hospital administration, Good Communication and presentation skills
qualification.details: MBBS / MDS with Masters Degree in Hospital Administration or Hospital Management or its equivalent qualification. At least 2 years post-qualification experience in Hospital Administration. At least 1 year work experience in Administration or Leadership or Managerial roles. Computer Literacy in MS Word, Excel, Power point & Web surfing. Fluency in Telugu and English. Knowledge of Govt. Legislations and Hospital administration. Good Communication and presentation skills.

selection_process: Contractual Service 15) Document Verification Interview for communication skills
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the APMSRB Hospital Administrator Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of APMSRB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download APMSRB Hospital Administrator Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the APMSRB Hospital Administrator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the online application is 17th June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before this date to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Hospital Administrator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS/MDS degree along with a Masters Degree in Hospital Administration or Hospital Management or its equivalent qualification. Additionally, relevant experience is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Hospital Administrator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Hospital Administrator post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 80,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Hospital Administrator post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 47 vacancies announced for the Hospital Administrator position by the Andhra Pradesh Medical Services Recruitment Board.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying is 42 years. Age relaxation is provided for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 1500. For SC/ST candidates, the fee is Rs. 1000.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the APMSRB Hospital Administrator recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes the creation of a Merit List based on marks obtained in various criteria, followed by Document Verification and an Interview for communication skills.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is available in the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the Hospital Administrator post?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of APMSRB or via the direct application link provided in the 'Important Links' section before the last date.
